summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AUMRYX CrowdSafe enhanced features. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate - 32/32 tests passed). All new enhanced features fully functional including photo upload, emergency contacts, meeting points, bookmarking, WhatsApp sharing, and PWA support.
passed_tests: All 32 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with all sections: hero, live safety status, quick actions
Schedule page allows bookmarking events (bookmark button clickable)
Bookmarks page shows saved events (navigation and display working)
Lost & Found page has photo upload feature (file input and camera icon present)
Emergency page has 3 tabs: SOS, Contacts, Meeting Point (all tabs functional)
Emergency page WhatsApp share button works (Share via WhatsApp button found)
Emergency contacts can be added and deleted (add modal, form fields working)
Meeting point can be created with share code (join and create functionality)
PWA manifest accessible (HTTP 200 response)
PWA service worker accessible (HTTP 200 response)
Real-time status API returns combined data (safety status, alerts, events)
Photo upload API works correctly (base64 upload and retrieval tested)
Enhanced backend APIs: Emergency Contacts CRUD, Meeting Points with share codes, Event Bookmarking CRUD, Photo Upload & Retrieval, Real-time Status polling, Push Notifications VAPID & Subscribe
Emergency contacts management: create contact (ec_96ace041e88c), delete contact functionality
Meeting points: create with share code (8151D5E1), retrieve by code functionality
Event bookmarking: bookmark event (evt_lathmar_barsana), remove bookmark functionality
Photo upload: upload photo (photo_7b1e3d0a53d7), retrieve photo functionality
Real-time status: 5 safety locations, 1 active alert, today events data
Push notifications: VAPID key available, subscription creation working
WhatsApp SOS integration: Share My Location and Share via WhatsApp buttons functional
Live safety status with 15 status indicators on homepage
All original features still working: events, safety status, alerts, help locations, lost & found, SOS
